_comment: Depth-only workflow for the parallax MV mode. Takes an input image (substituted via {image}) and outputs a grayscale depth map saved as 'eos-depth_*.png'. The actual parallax warp happens locally in apps/music-studio/assembler.py — this workflow only computes the depth.
_requires: kijai/ComfyUI-DepthAnythingV2 — installs nodes 'DownloadAndLoadDepthAnythingV2Model' + 'DepthAnything_V2'. Restart ComfyUI after install.
